ops.body: STAYS OPEN — fix attempted, gate failed structurally (E45, ledger b702c6f9). Best candidate (prompt v2 demanding-lead framing + K=3 majority, PANEL_VOTES=3): run A J=0.20, run B J=0.00 vs the pre-registered J>=0.3-both-runs bar; run stability DID improve (kappa 0.73 vs the 0.29 floor). The binding defect moved: 10/15 warranted golden rows are unanimous 3-0 STAY_SILENT under every framing tried — the packet windows lack pairwise signal (TPR plateaus ~0.33; pushing recall costs FPR ~0.67). Next step is the PACKET, not the prompt: human labels + resized strata (E17 sizing memo on cc17e0c: >=60 rows/stratum) — note the operator just landed a cc-present human-labeling tool for exactly this packet (c61b6677 "golden watcher-fires packet"), so relabeling is now tooled. The staged v2 fix lives in E45's artifacts (~/.cc-steer/experiments/E45-panel-v2/) and was NOT shipped; promotion gating through panel_labels remains uninformative (documented in instrument card v1.1).
